HOW CURBY WORKS

Curby surfaces free curbside furniture and household items left by neighbors in your area. Browse the map to find items near you, reserve what you want, and collect it within 72 hours. Post your own items when you are ready to pass something on. No fees, no middlemen — just neighbors helping neighbors.

Reservations are held for 72 hours, and can only be cancelled within 24 hours. Repeated no-shows affect your collector rating.

    Reserve this item?

    —

    Confirming your reservation notifies the poster and holds this item for you. You will have 72 hours to collect it from the pickup location. The item will be marked as reserved and removed from public availability.

    Curby operates on trust. Failing to collect a reserved item within 72 hours will result in an automatic cancellation and a reduction to your collector rating. Repeated no-shows may restrict your ability to reserve future listings.

    Item reserved. The poster has been notified. Head to the pickup location within 72 hours to collect your item. It is now marked as reserved and no longer visible to other collectors.
